hero.role: C-Level · Chief AI & Digital Officer · Digital Transformation · Product & Business Strategy

about.title: Over 20 years turning technology into business results.
paragraphs: Executive with more than 25 years of experience leading digital transformation, product development and business growth in multinational companies and complex environments.
Experience in business development and in the design and implementation of global corporate solutions with international rollouts.
Creation and leadership of business units, product, transformation strategy, AI & data-oriented strategy, C-suite stakeholder management, multidisciplinary teams and P&L.

personal.title: Beyond the office
personal.lead: In every area of our lives we are part of a much richer whole. Who I am outside the office defines how I lead within it.

items.name: Diving
items.value: Trust in the team and camaraderie

competencies.title: Core expertise
competencies.lead: Where I bring differential value to an organisation.

items.title: Digital transformation
items.desc: Design and execution of strategies that integrate business, technology and data at global scale.

items.title: AI applied to business
items.desc: LLMs & generative AI focused on operational efficiency and real-time decision-making with measurable impact.

items.title: Product strategy
items.desc: Definition of vision, roadmap and product evolution oriented to the customer and to new revenue streams.

items.title: Business Development
items.desc: Growth and international expansion (LATAM, EMEA, USA), opening new markets and new business lines.

items.title: Team leadership
items.desc: Leading multidisciplinary teams and change management in complex organisations.

items.title: Data-driven vision
items.desc: Predictive models and KPIs as the engine of decision-making, efficiency and competitive advantage.

experience.title: Career path
experience.lead: A journey of impact: from consulting to C-Level leadership. Scroll to explore.

items.action: Led the organisation's digital transformation through a global corporate platform that integrates data, processes and capabilities in real time. Directed AI, LLM, analytics and automation initiatives with direct impact on efficiency and scalability.
results: Global rollout: 11 countries, +3,000 active users, +16,000 integrated sites
+70,000 operations monitored with AI in Help Operation
Real-time predictive decision model managed via KPIs
Differentiating solution with high added value vs. the industry standard

items.action: Developed and scaled a business unit combining product strategy, commercial development and international expansion, shifting the model towards a customer focus, efficiency and new technology-driven revenue streams.
results: Revenue growth: +10%
International expansion: LATAM and EMEA
Creation of new business lines and technology services
Full repositioning of the unit with technology integration

items.action: Created and launched the Airport Division from scratch, leading the operating model, commercial strategy and initial structure of the business unit, with a focus on scalability and regulatory compliance.

facts.text: Creation of the airport security model

results: Generated €32M in business volume (initial phase)
International expansion: Portugal
Positioned the division as an industry benchmark
Successful globalisation of the operating and commercial model

items.action: Designed and deployed a new commercial model based on a 360º customer view, transforming the area towards a data-driven, customer-centric approach.

facts.text: Redefinition and digitalisation of the commercial model

results: Nationwide Salesforce CRM deployment (Spain)
Customer 360 model for key accounts
Data-driven cross-selling and up-selling strategies
Full CRM adoption by the sales force

items.action: Created and integrated a new division within the corporate group, defining a scalable operating model and aligning processes and teams to strengthen the customer value proposition.
results: Unit transfer keeping 100% of the client portfolio
Retention and growth of the consulting team
Full integration into the corporate structure

items.action: Founded and led a consultancy specialised in SAP technical solutions for corporate clients, leading global strategy, business development and operations from scratch.
results: Scaled from 0 to 30 professionals
Revenue: ~€1M
Reference SAP provider for corporate clients
Managed the full cycle: sales, delivery and operations

items.action: Managed complex ERP/SAP implementation projects for corporate clients: Telefónica, BASF Group, Sogecable and MediaSet.
results: Successful delivery of ERP/SAP solutions meeting objectives
Simultaneous management of multiple enterprise projects
Consolidation of strategic account relationships
